testcase.name: radiobutton
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › Report\report_demo.spec.ts:3:5 › radiobutton ────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).not.toBeChecked() failed
Locator: locator('#male') Expected: not checked Received: checked Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "not toBeChecked" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('#male') 9 × locator resolved to <input id="male" type="radio" value="male" name="gender" class="form-check-input"/> - unexpected value "checked"
4 | await page.goto('https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com/') 5 | await page.locator('#male').check(); > 6 | await expect(page.locator('#male')).not.toBeChecked(); | ^ 7 | }) 8 | 9 | test("multi dropdown", async({page})=>{ at C:\Users\2422034\OneDrive - Cognizant\Documents\Playwright Batch Mar18\tests\Report\report_demo.spec.ts:6:45
